rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `SemisimpleGroup.instReductiveGroup` (lines 77-78) is redundant because `class ... extends` already generates `toReductiveGroup` as an instance in Lean 4, and plausibly flags that `⟨1, by simp⟩` reinvents a Mathlib zero-nilpotency lemma; acting on both findings removes dead code and improves library reuse, while Review 1 misses both.
